description: Healthcare identity resolution platform. Matches and manages patient identities across healthcare systems using referential matching. Solves duplicate medical records and improves patient matching accuracy.
business_model: B2B - Identity platform to healthcare organizations
key_investors: Felicitas Global Partners, Bessemer Venture Partners
competitive_advantage: 99.9% match accuracy, referential matching technology, proven results

varden_fit.rationale: Identity infrastructure - critical for multi-system healthcare
